mapper.sql: id, draft_id, published_version, task_type, task_status, retry_times, error_message, next_run_at, locked_by, locked_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into content_publish_task ( draft_id, published_version, task_type, task_status, retry_times, error_message, next_run_at, locked_by, locked_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{draftId}, #{publishedVersion}, #{taskType}, #{status}, #{retryTimes}, #{errorMessage}, #{nextRunAt}, #{lockedBy}, #{lockedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: update content_publish_task set task_status = #{status}, retry_times = #{retryTimes}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, next_run_at = #{nextRunAt}, locked_by = #{lockedBy}, locked_at = #{lockedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select from content_publish_task where task_status = #{status} order by updated_at asc, id asc
select from content_publish_task where draft_id = #{draftId} order by updated_at desc, id desc

select from content_publish_task where (task_status = 'PENDING' or task_status = 'FAILED') and (next_run_at is null or next_run_at <= #{now}) and (locked_at is null or locked_at < #{lockExpiredBefore}) order by updated_at asc, id asc limit #{limit} for update
